qa_pairs.question: Which tracks composed by Willie Dixon are priced at most 0.99?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
WHERE tracks.unit_price <= 0.99 AND tracks.composer = 'Willie Dixon'
